title: hopea subalata
intro: Hopea subalata is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and known for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Hopea subalata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
